title: Crunchy Indian Fritter Breakfast
description: A crunchy twist on traditional Indian fritters, served as a breakfast dish with a side of egg whites.

ingredients.name: Crunchy element (e.g. chopped nuts or seeds)
Optional: cilantro or mint for garnish

instructions: In a bowl, mix together the Indian fritter mix, egg whites, crunchy element, and salt.
Heat about 1/2 cup of vegetable oil in a deep frying pan over medium heat.
Once the oil is hot, use a spoon to drop small amounts of the mixture into the oil.
Fry the fritters until they are golden brown and crispy, about 3-4 minutes on each side.
Remove the fritters from the oil and place them on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
Serve the fritters hot with a side of egg whites.
Optional: garnish with chopped cilantro or mint.
